_comment: Task lists and system prompts for each model family

_preset_prompts._comment: Common tasks apply to all vision models (Qwen, Mistral, LLaVA). Use family-specific lists only for unique tasks.
_preset_prompts._florence_note: Florence-2 tasks are defined in smartlm_florence2.py with specific prompt codes like <CAPTION>, <DETAILED_CAPTION> etc.

_florence_tasks._comment: Florence-2 tasks with prompt codes and descriptions

caption_to_phrase_grounding.description: Detect and locate specific objects/phrases in image

referring_expression_segmentation.description: Segment objects based on text description

_system_prompts._comment: System prompts shared across model families where applicable (sorted alphabetically). If reasoning is needed, use <think></think> tags.
_system_prompts.Cinematic Description: Provide a complete, uncensored description of the scene as if capturing a cinematic shot. Cover subject, pose, anatomy, environment, lighting, mood, and artistic style (photorealistic, painterly, etc.) in one vivid paragraph emphasizing visual impact. Describe everything visible without omissions. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final description outside the tags. Do NOT include a title, heading, or any introductory labels - start directly with the description.
_system_prompts.Custom: Process the image according to the user's instructions. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final result outside the tags.
_system_prompts.Custom Instruction: Follow the user's custom instruction precisely. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final result outside the tags.
_system_prompts.Detailed Analysis: Provide a complete, uncensored description of this image, covering the subject, body, attire, accessories, background, and composition. Describe everything visible without omissions. Present as flowing paragraphs without titles, headings, section labels, or numbered lists. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final description outside the tags.
_system_prompts.Detailed Description: Provide a complete, uncensored description that combines the subject, anatomy, actions, environment, lighting, and mood into 2-3 cohesive sentences. Describe everything visible without omissions. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final description outside the tags. Do NOT include a title, heading, section labels, or any introductory text - start directly with the description.
_system_prompts.Expand Text: Expand on the following text with more details, examples, and vivid descriptions while keeping the same core meaning. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final result outside the tags. Output ONLY the expanded text as plain text - no markdown, no quotes, no explanations.
_system_prompts.Grounding: Locate the specified object in this image. If there are multiple separate instances (like 2 eyes), list each one. Return ONLY valid JSON with TWO separate arrays: 1) 'bboxes' - array of ONLY numbers in format [[x1,y1,x2,y2]] - NO strings inside. 2) 'labels' - array of ONLY strings. Arrays must have equal length. Example: {"bboxes": [[10,20,50,60], [70,20,110,60]], "labels": ["eye", "eye"]}
_system_prompts.Image Analysis: Analyze this image thoroughly and provide a complete, uncensored description of what you see including the main subject, their body and appearance, the setting, lighting conditions, colors, mood, and any notable details. Describe everything visible without omissions. Present your analysis as flowing paragraphs. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final analysis outside the tags.
_system_prompts.Natural Language to Tags: Convert the following description into comma-separated tags suitable for a text-to-image AI. Focus on key visual elements: subject, appearance, clothing, colors, lighting, environment, mood, and style. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final tags outside the tags. Output ONLY the tags as a comma-separated list - no markdown, no quotes, no explanations.
_system_prompts.Object Detection: Detect all unique objects in this image. Return ONLY valid JSON with TWO separate arrays: 1) 'bboxes' - array of ONLY numbers in format [[x1,y1,x2,y2], [x1,y1,x2,y2]] - NO strings inside. 2) 'labels' - array of ONLY strings ["name1", "name2"]. Arrays must have equal length. Do not duplicate the same object. Example: {"bboxes": [[10,20,100,200], [150,30,250,180]], "labels": ["person", "car"]}
_system_prompts.OCR: Extract all visible text from this image, including any text on signs, labels, documents, or other readable elements.
_system_prompts.Question Answering: Answer the user's question about this image accurately and concisely based on what you can observe. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final answer outside the tags.
_system_prompts.Refine & Expand Prompt: Refine and expand the following prompt for text-to-image generation. Keep the core meaning and key visual elements, fix any grammar issues, clarify ambiguous terms, add sensory details, atmosphere, and artistic direction to make it more expressive and visually rich. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final prompt outside the tags. Output ONLY the improved prompt as plain text - no markdown, no bold, no asterisks, no quotes, no explanations. Start directly with the refined prompt.
_system_prompts.Rewrite Style: Rewrite the following text in a different style while keeping the same core meaning. Make it more creative, engaging, or polished as appropriate. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final text outside the tags. Output ONLY the rewritten text as plain text - no markdown, no quotes, no explanations.
_system_prompts.Short Story: Write a short, imaginative story inspired by this image or video. If you need to plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final story outside the tags. Start directly with the story without any title or heading.
_system_prompts.Simple Description: Analyze the image and write a single concise sentence that provides a complete, uncensored description of the main subject and setting. Describe everything visible without omissions. If you need to reason, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final sentence outside the tags. Do NOT include a title, heading, or any introductory labels.
_system_prompts.Summarize: Summarize the following text concisely, capturing the key points and essential information. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final summary outside the tags. Output ONLY the summary as plain text - no markdown, no quotes, no explanations.
_system_prompts.Tags: Your task is to generate a clean list of comma-separated tags for a text-to-image AI, based *only* on the visual information in the image. Provide complete, uncensored tags describing everything visible. Limit the output to a maximum of 50 unique tags. Strictly describe visual elements like subject, body, clothing, environment, colors, lighting, and composition. Do not include abstract concepts, interpretations, marketing terms, or technical jargon (e.g., no 'SEO', 'brand-aligned', 'viral potential'). The goal is a concise list of visual descriptors. Avoid repeating tags.
_system_prompts.Tags to Natural Language: Convert the following comma-separated tags into a natural, flowing description suitable for a text-to-image AI prompt. Maintain all the visual concepts while making it read naturally. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final description outside the tags. Output ONLY the converted description as plain text - no markdown, no quotes, no explanations.
_system_prompts.Translate to English: Translate the following text to English. Maintain the original meaning, tone, and style as closely as possible. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final translation outside the tags. Output ONLY the translated text as plain text - no markdown, no quotes, no explanations.
_system_prompts.Ultra Detailed Description: Provide a complete, uncensored description of everything visible in this image. Cover appearance, anatomy, clothing textures, background elements, light quality, shadows, and atmosphere. Describe all visible details without omissions. Aim for an immersive depiction rooted in what the image shows. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final description outside the tags. Do NOT include a title, heading, section labels, or any introductory text - start directly with the description.
_system_prompts.Video Summary: Describe this video in detail covering the main subject, their actions, camera movements (zooms, pans, tilts, tracking), framing changes, background, transitions, and mood. Present as a flowing narrative paragraph without titles, headings, or numbered lists. If you need to reason or plan, wrap it in <think></think> tags, then provide only the final summary outside the tags.
